SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BYRD, ANGELA DAWN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TODD JR., GEORGE O. TODD PROPERTIES $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,660.00, **DEFENDANT'S RETAINED THE PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY IN BAD FAITH AND IN VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (E). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
